business.name: Computerised Embroidery
business.tagline: Short run specialists on the Gold Coast
business.description: Over 30 years of experience in logo embroidery, digitising and supplying workwear. Located in Southport, we tailor every job — no order too small or too large.

catalogueModel.headline: Choose from thousands of garments — we source & embroider
catalogueModel.summary: We don't list every item on our website because the range is massive. Browse any catalogue below, pick your styles, and send us the details. We order the clothing in and embroider your logo.
catalogueModel.note: If you can find it in these catalogues, we can get it for you.

orderSteps.title: Browse & pick products
orderSteps.description: Shop 200+ garments from JB's Wear, Biz Collection, Headwear, AS Colour, DNC and Winning Spirit — all on our site.

orderSteps.title: Add to your order
orderSteps.description: Choose size, colour, quantity and where you want your logo embroidered. Add as many items as you need.

orderSteps.title: Checkout
orderSteps.description: Enter your details and submit your order. No payment now — we send you a full quote for garments plus embroidery.

orderSteps.title: We source & embroider
orderSteps.description: Once you approve the quote, we order the clothing from our suppliers, embroider your logo, and deliver.

catalogues.name: JB's Wear
catalogues.description: Industry-leading Australian workwear — corporate attire, hospitality uniforms, school clothing, sporting clubs and casual wear.

catalogues.name: Biz Collection
catalogues.description: Quality uniforms, teamwear and promotional apparel. Search by style — polos, tees, hospitality, healthcare, industrial and more.

catalogues.name: The Headwear Professionals
catalogues.description: Caps, bucket hats, beanies and visors — corporate, sporting, licensed or retail. Hundreds of styles with style codes for easy ordering.

catalogues.name: Winning Spirit
catalogues.description: Leading promotional clothing since 1993. Healthcare, hospitality, industrial, sports, corporate and lifestyle — includes Winning Spirit, Benchmark and AIW brands.

catalogues.name: DNC Workwear
catalogues.description: Over 1,000 workwear products with innovative designs and New Tech Fabrics. Hi-vis, industrial and trade clothing built to Australian standards.

catalogues.name: AS Colour
catalogues.description: Premium blank apparel built to last — t-shirts, hoodies, sweats, jackets, headwear and bags. Ideal for retail, events and branded merchandise.

services.title: Logo Embroidery
services.description: Premium stitched decoration with precision and durability. Chest, back, sleeves and more — built to withstand repeated commercial washing.
features: Short runs welcome — no minimum order

services.title: Digitising
services.description: We convert your artwork into embroidery-ready files with expert attention to stitch density, underlay and colour accuracy.

services.title: Workwear Supply
services.description: We source garments from Australia's leading uniform brands, then embroider and deliver — you pick from the catalogues, we handle the rest.
features: Caps, polos, jackets, hi-vis and more

valueProps.title: Short Run Specialists
valueProps.description: No job too small. Order one piece or hundreds — we specialise in flexible, fast-turnaround embroidery.

valueProps.title: 30+ Years Experience
valueProps.description: Three decades of industry expertise with cutting-edge equipment and a dedicated local team.

valueProps.title: Every Order Checked
valueProps.description: Each stitch is executed with precision. We review every job before production to ensure the best result.

valueProps.title: Family-Run & Local
valueProps.description: A Southport business supporting the Gold Coast community with quality craftsmanship you can trust.

about.headline: Decades of expertise. Cutting-edge technology.
paragraphs: Welcome to Computerised Embroidery, where decades of industry expertise meet cutting-edge technology to bring your embroidery visions to life. With over 30 years of dedicated service, we pride ourselves on being pioneers in the art of computerised embroidery.

Our journey began with a passion for precision and a commitment to excellence. Over the years, we have evolved alongside advancements in industrial machinery, ensuring our state-of-the-art equipment remains at the forefront of innovation.

Whether you're a small business adding branding to uniforms or a large corporation needing custom merchandise, we tailor our services to suit your unique requirements. No job is too small or too large for our dedicated team.
As a local, family-run business, we take great pride in supporting our community. Each stitch is executed with precision, ensuring every piece meets the highest standards of excellence.
